records.heroCopy: Come for pantry staples, stay for the community spirit.
firstVisitGuide: Call ahead to confirm delivery availability.
Bring no ID—just your address for service.
Ask about dietary accommodations during signup.
records.plainEligibility: Everyone homebound in our service area is welcome.

records.name: Bethany Presbyterian Church
records.hours: Every Sunday at 12pm for meal service
records.raw_text: Bethany Presbyterian Church | Phone: (301) 670-1200 | Website: https://www.bethanyem.org/ | Hours: Every Sunday at 12pm for meal service | Type: Meal Service | Accessibility: Walk-in | Languages: Korean | Food Distribution Format: We currently provide meal service in a format where the church cooks directly in accordance with the food permit guidance. Distribution Dates/Hours: Every Sunday at 12pm, 12:30 pm on Thursday during the semester season for the Senior School, and once per month for the homeless project.
records.heroCopy: Community gathers for nourishing meals with warmth and shared hope.
firstVisitGuide: Arrive by 12pm Sundays for hearty, freshly cooked meals.
No appointment needed—just walk in and join.
Korean-speaking staff available for support and connection.
records.culturalNotes: Primarily serves Korean-speaking community with English support.

records.name: Little Free Pantry at Gaithersburg Presbyterian Church (Manna Partner)
records.raw_text: Little Free Pantry at Gaithersburg Presbyterian Church (Manna Partner) | Phone: (301) 424-1130 | Website: https://www.mannafood.org | Hours: 24/7 | Accessibility: Walk-in | (North Entrance of Gaithersburg Presbyterian Church next to Little Free Library.) Looking for a snack after a commute on the 55 or 59 bus? Living in Gaithersburg and in need of some dinner or lunch materials? Wanting to find somewhere to give away that flavor of granola bar you don’t like? Stop by and see what the Little Free Pantry has to offer. Take what you need and give what you can!
records.heroCopy: A small act of kindness for those needing nourishment or sharing extras.
firstVisitGuide: Take what you need—no questions asked.
Leave what you can for others in need.
Located near a Little Free Library for easy access.

records.name: Metro DC Hispanic Contractors Community Services
records.hours: Once a month at specific SHARE distribution sites in Silver Spring and Gaithersburg MD. Contact for more info.
records.raw_text: Metro DC Hispanic Contractors Community Services | Phone: (301) 401-7317 | Website: https://www.dchccommunityservices.org/ | Hours: Once a month at specific SHARE distribution sites in Silver Spring and Gaithersburg MD. Contact for more info. | Type: Pre-Packed Pantry Items | Accessibility: Appointment Required | Languages: Spanish | Features: Fresh Produce | Zipcodes served: 20877, 20878, 20879, 2088, 20886, 20874, 20876, 20910, 20902, 20901
records.heroCopy: Fresh fresh food and a friendly face at this local food pantry.
firstVisitGuide: Call ahead to schedule your appointment for pantry access.
Bring your ID to confirm participation in the program.
Expect pre-packed items including produce and essentials.
records.plainEligibility: Appointment required. No ID needed for first visit.

records.name: Church of the Redeemer (Manna Partner)
records.hours: Mondays 2:00-4:30 pm
records.raw_text: Church of the Redeemer (Manna Partner) | Phone: (301) 424-1130 | Website: https://www.mannafood.org | Hours: Mondays 2:00-4:30 pm | Features: Fresh Produce
records.heroCopy: Fresh food for neighbors when they need nourishment most.
firstVisitGuide: Arrive between 2-4:30pm on Mondays for produce distribution.
No appointment needed—just walk in with your community.
Ask about volunteer opportunities to give back together.
